targets.rawSql:
SELECT round(100.0 * countIf(sc.variance_qty = 0) / nullIf(count(), 0), 2) AS value
FROM inventory_mart.fact_stock_counts sc
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = sc.sku_id
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = sc.warehouse_id
WHERE sc.count_date >= today() - 60
  AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR sc.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
  AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
  AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
  AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
  AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR sc.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))

SELECT round(avg(abs(sc.variance_qty)), 2) AS value
FROM inventory_mart.fact_stock_counts sc
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = sc.sku_id
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = sc.warehouse_id
WHERE sc.count_date >= today() - 60
  AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR sc.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
  AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
  AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
  AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
  AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR sc.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))

WITH latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS snapshot_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily
)
,
    latest_stock AS (
      SELECT
        s.snapshot_date,
        s.warehouse_id,
        s.sku_id,
        s.available_qty,
        s.damaged_qty,
        s.in_transit_qty,
        round(s.inventory_value, 2) AS inventory_value
      FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s
      WHERE s.snapshot_date = (SELECT snapshot_date FROM latest_snapshot)
    ),
    last_movement AS (
      SELECT
        warehouse_id,
        sku_id,
        max(event_date) AS last_movement_date
      FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_movement
      GROUP BY warehouse_id, sku_id
    ),
    aging_base AS (
      SELECT
        ls.warehouse_id,
        ls.sku_id,
        ls.available_qty,
        ls.damaged_qty,
        ls.in_transit_qty,
        ls.inventory_value,
        coalesce(lm.last_movement_date, ls.snapshot_date) AS last_movement_date,
        dateDiff('day', coalesce(lm.last_movement_date, ls.snapshot_date), ls.snapshot_date) AS days_since_movement
      FROM latest_stock ls
      LEFT JOIN last_movement lm ON lm.warehouse_id = ls.warehouse_id AND lm.sku_id = ls.sku_id
      WHERE ls.available_qty > 0
    )

            SELECT round(sumIf(inventory_value, days_since_movement > 90), 2) AS value
            FROM aging_base

WITH latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS snapshot_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily
)
,
    latest_stock AS (
      SELECT
        s.snapshot_date,
        s.warehouse_id,
        s.sku_id,
        s.available_qty,
        s.damaged_qty,
        s.in_transit_qty,
        round(s.inventory_value, 2) AS inventory_value
      FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s
      WHERE s.snapshot_date = (SELECT snapshot_date FROM latest_snapshot)
    ),
    last_movement AS (
      SELECT
        warehouse_id,
        sku_id,
        max(event_date) AS last_movement_date
      FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_movement
      GROUP BY warehouse_id, sku_id
    ),
    aging_base AS (
      SELECT
        ls.warehouse_id,
        ls.sku_id,
        ls.available_qty,
        ls.damaged_qty,
        ls.in_transit_qty,
        ls.inventory_value,
        coalesce(lm.last_movement_date, ls.snapshot_date) AS last_movement_date,
        dateDiff('day', coalesce(lm.last_movement_date, ls.snapshot_date), ls.snapshot_date) AS days_since_movement
      FROM latest_stock ls
      LEFT JOIN last_movement lm ON lm.warehouse_id = ls.warehouse_id AND lm.sku_id = ls.sku_id
      WHERE ls.available_qty > 0
    )

            SELECT round(sumIf(inventory_value, days_since_movement BETWEEN 31 AND 90), 2) AS value
            FROM aging_base

WITH latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS snapshot_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily
)

            SELECT sum(s.damaged_qty) AS value
            FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s
            LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = s.sku_id
            LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = s.warehouse_id
            WHERE s.snapshot_date = (SELECT snapshot_date FROM latest_snapshot)
              AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR s.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
              AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
              AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
              AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
              AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))

WITH latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS snapshot_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily
)

            SELECT sum(s.in_transit_qty) AS value
            FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s
            LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = s.sku_id
            LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = s.warehouse_id
            WHERE s.snapshot_date = (SELECT snapshot_date FROM latest_snapshot)
              AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR s.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
              AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
              AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
              AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
              AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))

WITH latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS snapshot_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily
),
latest_stock AS (
  SELECT
    s.snapshot_date,
    s.warehouse_id,
    s.sku_id,
    s.available_qty,
    round(s.inventory_value, 2) AS inventory_value
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s
  WHERE s.snapshot_date = (SELECT snapshot_date FROM latest_snapshot)
),
last_movement AS (
  SELECT
    warehouse_id,
    sku_id,
    max(event_date) AS last_movement_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_movement
  GROUP BY warehouse_id, sku_id
),
aging_base AS (
  SELECT
    ls.inventory_value,
    dateDiff('day', coalesce(lm.last_movement_date, ls.snapshot_date), ls.snapshot_date) AS days_since_movement
  FROM latest_stock ls
  LEFT JOIN last_movement lm ON lm.warehouse_id = ls.warehouse_id AND lm.sku_id = ls.sku_id
  WHERE ls.available_qty > 0
),
bucket_values AS (
  SELECT
    multiIf(
      days_since_movement <= 30, '0-30 days',
      days_since_movement <= 60, '31-60 days',
      days_since_movement <= 90, '61-90 days',
      '90+ days'
    ) AS aging_bucket,
    round(sum(inventory_value), 2) AS aging_value
  FROM aging_base
  GROUP BY aging_bucket
),
bucket_order AS (
  SELECT arrayJoin(['0-30 days', '31-60 days', '61-90 days', '90+ days']) AS aging_bucket
)
SELECT
  bo.aging_bucket,
  coalesce(bv.aging_value, 0) AS aging_value
FROM bucket_order bo
LEFT JOIN bucket_values bv USING (aging_bucket)
ORDER BY indexOf(['0-30 days', '31-60 days', '61-90 days', '90+ days'], bo.aging_bucket)

SELECT
  coalesce(w.warehouse_name, sc.warehouse_id) AS warehouse,
  round(100.0 * countIf(sc.variance_qty = 0) / nullIf(count(), 0), 2) AS accuracy_pct
FROM inventory_mart.fact_stock_counts sc
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = sc.warehouse_id
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = sc.sku_id
WHERE sc.count_date >= today() - 60
  AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR sc.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
  AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
  AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
  AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
  AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR sc.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))
GROUP BY warehouse
ORDER BY accuracy_pct ASC

SELECT
  sc.count_date AS time,
  round(avg(abs(sc.variance_qty)), 2) AS avg_abs_variance,
  round(100.0 * countIf(sc.variance_qty = 0) / nullIf(count(), 0), 2) AS accuracy_pct
FROM inventory_mart.fact_stock_counts sc
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = sc.sku_id
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = sc.warehouse_id
WHERE sc.count_date >= today() - 60
  AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR sc.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
  AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
  AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
  AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
  AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR sc.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))
GROUP BY sc.count_date
ORDER BY sc.count_date

WITH latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS snapshot_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily
)

            SELECT
              coalesce(w.warehouse_name, s.warehouse_id) AS warehouse,
              round(sum(s.inventory_value), 2) AS inventory_value
            FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s
            LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = s.warehouse_id
            LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = s.sku_id
            WHERE s.snapshot_date = (SELECT snapshot_date FROM latest_snapshot)
              AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR s.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
              AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
              AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
              AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
              AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))
            GROUP BY warehouse
            ORDER BY inventory_value DESC

WITH latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS snapshot_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily
),
latest_stock AS (
  SELECT
    s.snapshot_date AS snapshot_date,
    s.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id,
    s.sku_id AS sku_id,
    s.available_qty AS available_qty,
    s.damaged_qty AS damaged_qty,
    s.in_transit_qty AS in_transit_qty,
    round(s.inventory_value, 2) AS inventory_value
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s
  LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = s.warehouse_id
  LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = s.sku_id
  WHERE s.snapshot_date = (SELECT snapshot_date FROM latest_snapshot)
    AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR s.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
    AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
    AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
    AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
    AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))
),
last_movement AS (
  SELECT
    warehouse_id,
    sku_id,
    max(event_date) AS last_movement_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_movement
  GROUP BY warehouse_id, sku_id
),
aging_base AS (
  SELECT
    ls.warehouse_id,
    ls.sku_id,
    ls.available_qty,
    ls.damaged_qty,
    ls.in_transit_qty,
    ls.inventory_value,
    coalesce(lm.last_movement_date, ls.snapshot_date) AS last_movement_date,
    dateDiff('day', coalesce(lm.last_movement_date, ls.snapshot_date), ls.snapshot_date) AS days_since_movement
  FROM latest_stock ls
  LEFT JOIN last_movement lm ON lm.warehouse_id = ls.warehouse_id AND lm.sku_id = ls.sku_id
  WHERE ls.available_qty > 0
)
SELECT
  coalesce(w.warehouse_name, a.warehouse_id) AS warehouse,
  a.sku_id AS sku_id,
  coalesce(p.sku_name, a.sku_id) AS sku_name,
  coalesce(p.category, 'Unknown') AS category,
  a.available_qty,
  a.inventory_value,
  a.last_movement_date,
  a.days_since_movement,
  if(a.days_since_movement >= 30, 'Dead/Slow >=30d', 'Top slow recent movers') AS slow_moving_bucket
FROM aging_base a
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = a.sku_id
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = a.warehouse_id
ORDER BY
  if(a.days_since_movement >= 30, 1, 0) DESC,
  a.days_since_movement DESC,
  a.inventory_value DESC
LIMIT 25

SELECT
  coalesce(w.warehouse_name, sc.warehouse_id) AS warehouse,
  count() AS count_events,
  round(avg(abs(sc.variance_qty)), 2) AS avg_abs_variance,
  round(sum(abs(sc.variance_qty)), 2) AS total_abs_variance,
  round(100.0 * countIf(sc.variance_qty = 0) / nullIf(count(), 0), 2) AS accuracy_pct
FROM inventory_mart.fact_stock_counts sc
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = sc.warehouse_id
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = sc.sku_id
WHERE sc.count_date >= today() - 60
  AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR sc.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
  AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
  AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
  AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
  AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR sc.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))
GROUP BY warehouse
ORDER BY accuracy_pct ASC, total_abs_variance DESC

SELECT toDateTime(snapshot_date) AS time, sum(available_qty) AS available_qty, sum(on_hand_qty) AS on_hand_qty FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily WHERE $__timeFilter(snapshot_date) AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote})) AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote})) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toDateTime(created_date) AS time, sum(qty) AS sold_qty, round(sum(sales_amount),2) AS sales_amount FROM inventory_mart.fact_sales_order_lines WHERE $__timeFilter(created_date) AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote})) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

WITH latest AS (SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS d FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily) SELECT s.warehouse_id, s.sku_id, p.sku_name, p.category, p.brand, s.on_hand_qty, s.available_qty, p.reorder_point, p.max_stock, s.inventory_value FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON s.sku_id = p.sku_id WHERE s.snapshot_date = (SELECT d FROM latest) AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR s.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote})) AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote})) ORDER BY s.inventory_value DESC LIMIT 50

WITH latest AS (SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS d FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily) SELECT countIf(s.available_qty < 0) AS negative_stock_rows FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = s.sku_id LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = s.warehouse_id WHERE s.snapshot_date = (SELECT d FROM latest) AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR s.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote})) AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote})) AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote})) AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote})) AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))

SELECT if(count() = 0, NULL, toUInt32((now() - max(s.ingestion_time)) / 3600)) AS snapshot_lag_hours FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = s.sku_id LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = s.warehouse_id WHERE ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR s.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote})) AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote})) AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote})) AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote})) AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))

SELECT toInt64(toUnixTimestamp(max(ingestion_time)) * 1000) AS last_mart_ingestion_time FROM (SELECT ingestion_time FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily UNION ALL SELECT ingestion_time FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_movement UNION ALL SELECT ingestion_time FROM inventory_mart.fact_purchase_order_lines UNION ALL SELECT ingestion_time FROM inventory_mart.fact_sales_order_lines UNION ALL SELECT ingestion_time FROM inventory_mart.fact_stock_counts)

WITH latest AS (SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS d FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily) SELECT count() AS total_rows, countIf(p.category = '' OR p.category IS NULL) AS missing_category_rows, countIf(p.brand = '' OR p.brand IS NULL) AS missing_brand_rows, countIf(s.available_qty < 0) AS negative_available_rows FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON s.sku_id = p.sku_id LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = s.warehouse_id WHERE s.snapshot_date = (SELECT d FROM latest) AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR s.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote})) AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote})) AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote})) AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote})) AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT region FROM inventory_mart.dim_warehouse WHERE region != '' ORDER BY region
list.label: Region
list.name: region
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT region FROM inventory_mart.dim_warehouse WHERE region != '' ORDER BY region

list.definition: SELECT warehouse_id FROM inventory_mart.dim_warehouse WHERE ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR region IN (${region:singlequote})) ORDER BY warehouse_id
list.label: Warehouse
list.name: warehouse
list.query: SELECT warehouse_id FROM inventory_mart.dim_warehouse WHERE ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR region IN (${region:singlequote})) ORDER BY warehouse_id

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM inventory_mart.dim_product WHERE category != '' ORDER BY category
list.label: Category
list.name: category
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM inventory_mart.dim_product WHERE category != '' ORDER BY category

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT brand FROM inventory_mart.dim_product WHERE ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR category IN (${category:singlequote})) AND brand != '' ORDER BY brand
list.label: Brand
list.name: brand
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT brand FROM inventory_mart.dim_product WHERE ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR category IN (${category:singlequote})) AND brand != '' ORDER BY brand

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT supplier_name FROM inventory_mart.dim_supplier WHERE supplier_name != '' ORDER BY supplier_name
list.label: Supplier
list.name: supplier
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT supplier_name FROM inventory_mart.dim_supplier WHERE supplier_name != '' ORDER BY supplier_name

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT sku_id FROM inventory_mart.dim_product WHERE ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR category IN (${category:singlequote})) AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR brand IN (${brand:singlequote})) ORDER BY sku_id
list.label: SKU
list.name: sku
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT sku_id FROM inventory_mart.dim_product WHERE ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR category IN (${category:singlequote})) AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR brand IN (${brand:singlequote})) ORDER BY sku_id
